My Last.fm Top 1000 Artists

This page lists my top 1000 artists on Last.fm by play count. Read my blog post for more info on how I turned the data into a page and you can see my top 50 artists from the week on my special "wall".

Bonus content!

I liked the idea of grouping artists by 100s of scrobbles so here are the "Klubs", from 100–1,000:

2K+ Klub 🥇

Zero 7, Jamiroquai, Wun Two, Ahwlee, J Dilla, Black Milk, Madlib, Seal, Michael Jackson, KAYTRANADA, Khruangbin, Prince, Knxwledge

1K Klub 🥈

Jessie Ware, Flying Lotus, Jay Dee, Slum Village, Madvillain, Justice, Feist, A Tribe Called Quest, Gabriel Garzón-Montano, Quadron, SiR, Charlotte Day Wilson, Air, Luther Vandross

900 Klub 🥉

4hero

800 Klub: Stevie Wonder, Quasimoto

700 Klub: Bill Evans, Quantic, NxWorries, Q-Tip, The Brand New Heavies

600 Klub: Donald Fagen, Jaylib, Little Dragon, Ronnie Laws

500 Klub: Bonobo, MF DOOM, Robert Palmer, starchildluke, Moloko, De La Soul, George Michael, Erykah Badu, Herbie Hancock, Claude Debussy, Janet Jackson, Common, Jamie Isaac, Yesterdays New Quintet

400 Klub: Cassius, B. Cool-Aid, Bruno Mars, The Jacksons, Daft Punk, D'Angelo, Thundercat

300 Klub: George Benson, Roberta Flack, AbJo, Freddie Gibbs, CoryaYo, Friendly Fires, Simply Red, OutKast, Jamie Lidell, Sade, Paul Young, The Pharcyde, The Roots, Rhye, Miles Davis, The Foreign Exchange, James Brown, Marvin Gaye

200 Klub: Alicia Keys, Jill Scott, Maxwell, Anita Baker, Lambchop, Blu & Exile, Mndsgn, Nick Hakim, Sia, Roisin Murphy, Mitch Hedberg, Oh No, The Cinematic Orchestra, Ryuichi Sakamoto, Gregory Porter, João Gilberto, Emily King, Ravyn Lenae, BADBADNOTGOOD, Dego, Teedra Moses, Illa J, Kanye West, Raphael Saadiq, Anderson .Paak, Sanchez

100 Klub: J*DaVeY, Fleetwood Mac, Hiatus Kaiyote, Ohbliv, FloFilz, Strong Arm Steady, Eric Lau, mujo, Tall Black Guy, Kendrick Lamar, Via Audio, Röyksopp, Samiyam, Neil Frances, Jorge Ben Jor, RJD2, John Holt, Nightmares on Wax, Tuamie, Lisa Shaw, Shad, DJ Shadow, Exile, Nameless, AJMW, Groove Armada, Benny Sings, Kings of Convenience, Patrice Rushen, Jansport J, SEGA Sound Team, Jonwayne, Obsidian Blue, Aminé, Nick Colionne, Masashi Hamauzu, tajima hal, Guilty Simpson, T-SQUARE, Chic, Tanya Morgan, Bill Evans Trio, Blu, Nao, Taylor McFerrin, Wham!, Suhnraw, The Jackson 5, Oddisee, Busta Rhymes, DeBarge, Loose Ends, Smino, Freddie Joachim, MED, Elzhi, Simbrula Nox, Troubleman, Bilal, Somi, Modjo, Stan Getz, Frank Ocean, Joe Pass, Lighthouse Family, The Alchemist, Amel Larrieux, Elaquent, SIE Sound Team, Kenny Loggins, Knowsum, José González, Wyl, Don Philippe, Jazzanova, Róisín Murphy, Boogarins, Solange, Soul II Soul, Astronauts, etc., Frédéric Chopin, walterwarm, Astrud Gilberto, Andreya Triana, Nat King Cole, Sir Was, Σtella

Last updated: 20 Mar 2026
